examples: Both realism and naturalism are mimetic systems or practices of representation.
Has not twentieth-century art shown that naturalism does not necessarily follow abstraction in some kind of predetermined sequence?
As long as African American drama maintained naturalism as its dominant mode, it could only express the "plight of African American people".
Takal coaxes melodrama from first-person naturalism and smartly blends the allure of genre with do-it-yourself intimacy.
Fashions in gardens have, over the past 300 years, swung quite regularly between architectural formality and free-flowing naturalism.
